description: Dialogue for Varn the Scarred who introduces the player to the Bloodsand Arena

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: You've got the look of a fighter about you. Ever consider testing your skills in the arena?

choices.text: Not interested in fighting for sport.

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: The Bloodsand Arena. South of here, in the desert. It's where warriors go to prove themselves - or die trying. I fought there for years before I took this scar and retired. The gold is good, the glory even better... if you survive.

choices.text: I'm not interested in dying for entertainment.

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: I earned this scar in the arena - an ogre's axe nearly took my head off. Twenty-seven victories, undefeated champion for two years. Then one mistake, one moment of overconfidence, and I'm lucky to be alive. I retired while I still could. Some fighters aren't so wise.

choices.text: Do you regret fighting in the arena?

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: Regrets? No. I won glory, gold, and the respect of everyone who saw me fight. The scar reminds me that I'm mortal, but it also reminds me that I survived what killed lesser warriors. Would I do it again? In a heartbeat. Just with more caution.

choices.text: How do I join the arena?

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: Of course it's dangerous. That's the point. Civilians pay to watch warriors face death. The brave become legends. The rest become cautionary tales. But if you've got skill and courage, you can earn more in one fight than most make in a year.

choices.text: I'm interested. How do I join?

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: The Bloodsand Arena is run by Gormund the Pitmaster. He's the one who sets up the fights and takes the bets. Travel south from Elder Moor through the desert. You'll see the arena - hard to miss. Tell Gormund that Varn sent you. He'll give you a shot.

choices.text: What should I know before I go?

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: The arena has rules. No magic unless it's an arcane duel. No fleeing the sand. Fight until your opponent yields or dies - or until you do. Start with the lower tier fights to get a feel for it. And don't underestimate your opponents. Many have died thinking they were better than they were.

choices.text: Thanks for the advice. I'll find Gormund.
On second thought, this isn't for me.

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: Good luck. If you survive your first fight, come back and tell me about it. I'll want to hear how Gormund is running things these days. And remember - in the arena, hesitation kills.

nodes.speaker: Varn the Scarred
nodes.text: Not everyone has the stomach for it. No shame in that. But if you change your mind, you know where to find me.
